## Checklist

- [ ] The change stays within the linked issue scope
- [ ] Docs were updated where behavior or process changed
- [ ] Acceptance criteria were checked against the issue
- [ ] UI changes include responsive states and screenshots
- [ ] Secrets, client-sensitive data, and production values are not in this PR
- [ ] If AI was used, the output was reviewed, tested, and kept within approved data rules
